experience.title: Food and Beverage Manager
experience.description: Oversaw all aspects of food and beverage operations, including menu planning, inventory management, and cost control. Managed team of 100+ staff members. Liaised with other departments for seamless operations.

experience.title: Hospitality Manager
experience.description: Supervise team in providing best-in-class service daily. Coach and develop team. Focus on business metrics to drive performance.

experience.title: Store Manager
experience.description: Managed store operations, P&L, and team of 5-6 staff. Achieved Circle of Excellence ranking 110 out of 4300 stores. Annual gross revenue $800,000.

experience.title: Sales Manager
experience.description: Recruited, trained, and managed team of 8-10 staff. Consistently exceeded sales goals. Annual gross revenue $1-million.

experience.title: Store Manager
experience.description: Managed store operations and team of 6-8 staff. Increased profitability and shared monthly reports with owners. Annual gross revenue $2-million.

education.degree: Bachelor of Arts in Interdisciplinary Studies
